sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74760" key="o)rga/nwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀργᾰ´ν-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n74760.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">organization, arrangement,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
